我喜欢吃饼干当零食。(I like eating biscuits as a snack.)

p1-12.definition-english: Happy; joy; to like; to love
p1-12.sentence: 她非常喜欢画画。(She likes drawing very much.)
老师欢迎新同学加入班级。(The teacher welcomed the new student to the class.)

那只小猫很喜欢睡觉。(That kitten loves to sleep.)

p1-12.sentence: 春天我们去野外采花。(In spring we go outdoors to pick flowers.)

p1-12.sentence: 大家一起唱歌庆祝生日。(Everyone sang together to celebrate the birthday.)

p1-13.sentence: 这个工具很有用。(This tool is very useful.)

洗手后要用毛巾擦干。(After washing your hands, dry them with a towel.)

p1-13.english: to wipe, to smear, to erase
p1-13.definition-english: To wipe; to smear; to erase

p1-13.definition-english: To wash; to bathe; to rinse

p1-13.definition-english: To want; to need; must; should

p1-13.sentence: 运动后他去冲凉。(He went to shower after exercising.)

夏天我最喜欢吃西瓜。(In summer I like eating watermelon the most.)

p1-13.definition-english: To arrive; to reach; until; to

好的同伴让旅途更快乐。(Good companions make the journey more enjoyable.)

p1-19.english: to travel, to tour, to swim
